name: sona-qa-platform
description: Sona QA platform — daily accounting-quality reviews, tickets and Telegram reports

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.build: npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm --prefix client run build
